calendar.matters:
Settlement Protective Date.
Off Calendar Oct-04-2010 Off Calendar

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-30-2010 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for settlement on the record. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR #2542.

James Watson, Esq. special appeared for plaintiff U.S. Bank National Assoc. and with Plaintiff's Witness Najeen Sorrentino.
Defendant Manuel Raul Murillo present in pro per with Spanish Interpreter Mercedes Murillo.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Defendant agreed to vacate the premises located at 543 Athens St., San Francisco on Sept. 6, 2010 and return all keys to plaintiff in exchange for a payment by check from the Plaintiff in the amount of $5,000.00
Parties agreed to terms on the record, matter is deemed settled. Trial date vacted.
Matter to be scheduled for settlement protective date in Dept 218 on Oct. 4, 2010 at 9:00 a.m.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-30-2010 Assigned To Trial Court
